title: OctoMech Survivors
description:
A top-down “mech” x “action roguelite” has arrived!

Combat uses auto-fire, with a focus on movement and survival. You have up to 8 weapon slots, and a flexible weapon assembly system that lets you equip up to 4 copies of the same weapon. Oh, and don’t forget to manage your weight.

In OctoMech Survivors, you choose one of three mechs, boost through the battlefield, defeat enemies, and collect items and credits. As new slots unlock, buy and equip weapons based on your preferred blueprint. After clearing a stage, review your mech build on the assembly screen and take on the next stage.

8 stages. 8 slots. What does “Octo” really mean? You’ll find out soon enough.

About AssemblyOctoMech Survivors is not just a game about equipping whatever weapons you pick up. Between stages, you enter an assembly screen where you can buy the weapons you like, mount up to four of them, and fine-tune your build while balancing weight. It is a mech game that lets you fully enjoy the fun of assembling your loadout.

About MultiplayerThis game supports cooperative play with up to four players. You can create a room, fight alongside your allies, and bring each player's mech build together to take on the stages.

About StreamingStreaming and video uploads are very welcome. No permission is required.
description_short: Octomech Survivors is a top-down mech action roguelite focused on movement, survival, and auto-fire combat. Manage weight across 8 weapon slots, with up to 4 copies of the same weapon. Choose 1 of 3 mechs and create your own build!
